title: carpotroche longifolia
intro: Carpotroche longifolia is a medicinal plant species, also known as the Mexican copal tree or copal, which is native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpotroche longifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential in reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Carpotroche longifolia may include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
